|events=Dissolution of the [[Sith Empire (Pre-Republic)|first Sith Empire]]<ref name="END">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/88/indexp2.html|text=''Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties''|int=Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties}}</ref>}}
The following events took place in approximately '''27,700 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith species]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] are visited by the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] of the [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]], but [[King/Legends|King]] [[Adas]] leads his people in driving the Rakata offworld after realizing they intend to conquer the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
*Korriban is devastated by the Rakatan attack, turning it into a wasteland and causing most Sith to relocate to the forested world of [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]]. Korriban becomes the species' holy tombworld.<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>
*Using Rakatan [[Force-drive]]n hyperdrive technology, the Sith spread out among the planets of the [[Stygian Caldera]], and the planet [[Tund/Legends|Tund]] becomes a place of exile for heretics among the Sith.<ref name="Atlas" />

==Battles==
*[[Invasion of Korriban]]<ref name="Atlas" />
